residue.config.title: Residue
residue.config.enable_mod.desc: Completely enables or disables all Residue systems.
residue.config.debug.desc: Prints internal state (memory, observer, events) to the server log.
residue.config.clone.label: — Self Clone —
residue.config.clone.desc: Enables the self-clone — a distant copy of the player that disappears before it can be reached.
residue.config.clone.min_distance.desc: Minimum distance (in blocks) at which the clone can appear.
residue.config.clone.max_distance.desc: Maximum distance (in blocks) at which the clone can appear.
residue.config.clone.cooldown.desc: Minimum time (in seconds) between two clone appearances.
residue.config.dream.desc: Enables the dream sequence — after sleeping, a segment of gameplay may turn out to have been a dream.
residue.config.fake_lan.label: — Fake LAN —
residue.config.fake_lan.desc: Simulates opening the world to LAN — shows a system message and disables the Open to LAN button.
residue.config.fake_lan.min_minutes.desc: Minimum time in minutes before the Fake LAN event triggers.
residue.config.fake_lan.max_minutes.desc: Maximum time in minutes before the Fake LAN event triggers.
residue.config.torch.label: — Distant Torch —
residue.config.torch.desc: Enables distant torches that appear in the direction the player is looking and vanish when approached.
residue.config.torch.min_distance.desc: Minimum distance (in blocks) at which a torch can appear.
residue.config.torch.max_distance.desc: Maximum distance (in blocks) at which a torch can appear.
How close (in blocks) the player must get before the torch vanishes.
residue.config.torch.despawn_seconds.des: How many seconds the torch stays in the world if the player does not approach it.
residue.config.torch.max_active.desc: Maximum number of torches that can exist in the world at the same time.
residue.config.torch.spawn_chance.desc: Spawn probability per tick (value / 100000). Default 5 = 0.00005 per tick (~once every 3 minutes).
residue.config.torch.memory_min.desc: Minimum memory percentage at which torches can appear.
residue.config.torch.memory_max.desc: Maximum memory percentage at which torches can appear.
residue.config.observer.label: — Observer —
residue.config.observer.connect_chance_n: Chance of an observer connecting when Fake LAN is not active (value / 100000 per 5 seconds).
residue.config.observer.connect_chance_l: Chance of an observer connecting when Fake LAN is active (value / 1000 per 5 seconds).
residue.config.observer.flap_chance.desc: Percentage chance that a connecting observer will flap (connect/disconnect several times before staying).
residue.config.observer.session_min.desc: Minimum time (in seconds) an observer stays connected.
residue.config.observer.session_max.desc: Maximum time (in seconds) an observer stays connected.
residue.config.observer.max_simultaneous: Maximum number of observers that can be connected at the same time.
residue.config.max_memory.desc: The upper limit of memory. Event stages are calculated as percentages of this value.
residue.config.memory_seconds.desc: How often (in seconds) memory increases by one step. Lower values make the world deteriorate faster.
residue.config.llm_backend.desc:
Select the llama.cpp version to download.

§eAUTO§r: Automatically selects Vulkan (if GPU detected) or CPU.
§eVULKAN§r: Recommended. Works on AMD, Intel, Nvidia.
§eHIP§r: For AMD only (requires ROCm/HIP SDK).
§eCUDA§r: For Nvidia GPUs only.
§eCPU§r: CPU only (slower, universal).
residue.config.llm_model.desc:
Select the neural network model to download.

§eQwen 2.5 3B§r: Ultra-lightweight. Fastest response, ideal for weak PCs.

§eQwen 2.5 7B§r: The 'Golden Mean'. Best balance of speed and intelligence. Recommended for most users.

§eQwen 2.5 14B§r: Advanced reasoning. Requires 12+ GB RAM. Slower but much smarter.

§eGemma 2 9B§r: Google's model. Very creative and empathetic tone.

§eMistral 7B§r: The classic reliable model. Stable and predictable.

§eCustom§r: Use your own .gguf file. Specify filename in the field below.
residue.config.custom_model_name.desc:
Specify model filename (e.g., my_model.gguf).
File must be in: /residue_ai/
residue.config.hf_token.desc:
If downloads fail (error 429), get a free token here:
§9https://huggingface.co/settings/tokens§r

Paste it above to remove limits.
residue.config.llm_download.desc:
Downloads llama.cpp server and neural network model (~2 GB).

§eImportant:§r Select backend first!
residue.config.llm_cancel.desc: Cancels the current server or model download.
residue.message.files_not_found: §c[Residue] Files not found. Please download components in mod settings first.
residue.error.custom_model_required: Custom model: please specify filename in settings
